content: Can you help me delete not needed emails from my account?

"Can you help me delete not needed emails from my account?

I wanted you to help me delete not needed emails from my account. What do you need to help me with it?

Since you didn't respond to the previous question about how to handle email cleanup, I will proceed with a manual approach. This means that I will review each email and ask for your approval before taking any action.
